support.summary: No irreplaceable CEO lever; EB mapping is an RSD/VP motion
support.detail: The only strategic gap is an unidentified economic buyer (CFO/board budget owner) whom champion Omar Kaaki has not yet named. But this is an early-stage $200k Pipeline deal (Formal Evaluation, close 2026-12-31) with the competitive RFP not launching until October. Mapping the CFO through Omar and securing an initial exec connect is standard RSD/CRO work, not a CEO-irreplaceable veto or peer relationship. No blocked discount, roadmap commitment, or SE/POC guarantee is pending.
support.why_not_vp: EB is still unnamed and the next move is to map the CFO through Omar before the October RFP; a CRO/SVP can fully drive that mapping and initial exec sponsorship. No CEO-to-CEO peer relationship is required or actionable at this stage.

monitor.reason: No monitor trigger anchored to a <=14-day signal; deal is sub-$250k, not forecasted, active 3 days ago, and we are buyer-dependent.
